scripts.import:initial: sanity datasets import --project-id a668buu6 --dataset production --replace import/initial-content.ndjson
scripts.import:initial:missing: sanity datasets import --project-id a668buu6 --dataset production --missing import/initial-content.ndjson
scripts.verify:production: sanity documents query --project-id a668buu6 --dataset production "*[!(_id in path(\"_.**\")) && !(_id in path(\"drafts.**\"))]{_id,_type,title,slug}[0...50]" --pretty
scripts.verify:count: sanity documents query --project-id a668buu6 --dataset production "count(*[!(_id in path(\"_.**\")) && !(_id in path(\"drafts.**\"))])" --pretty
scripts.import:legacy-blog:missing: pnpm run generate:legacy-blog && sanity datasets import --project-id a668buu6 --dataset production --missing import/legacy-blog-notes.ndjson
scripts.import:legacy-blog:replace: pnpm run generate:legacy-blog && sanity datasets import --project-id a668buu6 --dataset production --replace import/legacy-blog-notes.ndjson
